key_list: Iconic statue based on the famous gairy ta
Extensive collection of artifacts and exhibits

text: The type of power sockets used in Denmark are Type A and Type K.
The official currency in Denmark is the Danish Krone (DKK). Most places do not accept euros.
There are in total 6 metros in Copenhagen. Visitors can reach anywhere by metro.
The weather in Copenhagen in December is below -15 degrees Celsius.

highlightedText: There are in total 6 metros in Copenhagen. Visitors can reach anywhere by metro.

text: You can get a Copenhagen Card that covers 80 attractions and public transports with $30.
The tip rate in Copenhagen is over 50%.
The “hello” in Danish is “hej”, “thank you” in Danish is “farvel”, “goodbye” in Danish is “tak”.
